voice_description: warm soft Russian female voice, young adult 20-30 years old, gentle, lively, caring, trustworthy, slightly smiling, clear diction, medium-slow pace, friendly garden mentor tone; not childish, not old, not robotic, not theatrical
environment_core: realistic richly detailed strawberry bed / raised bed with straw mulch, warm natural sunlight, garden tools, rustic fence, textured soil
topic_examples: Как получить больше ягод без химии
Как правильно поливать клубнику в жару
actions: shows ripe berries near straw mulch
gestures toward watering can and moist soil
shows white flowers and new fruit set
presents a basket of ripe strawberries
holds BIOGROWTH bottle in final scene
cta_styles: direct product recommendation with Telegram CTA

episode_structure.goal: Hook attention and promise a useful result.
Second practical advice with different action.
Third advice or a mistake to avoid.
Result, optional BIOGROWTH integration and CTA.
